news.t: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF

overview.description: The Fidelity Corporate Bond ETF (FCOR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed USD corporate bond fund. It aims to have similar interest-rate risk as the Barclays US Credit Bond Index. FCOR was launched on Oct 6, 2014 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ETF--Fidelity Investments launches new active fixed income ETF, Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF.
